subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath hastened with his heart toward the celestial Paradise, and when the Call was raised from the right hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من سرع بقلبه الی شطر الفردوس و اذا ارتفع الندا عن یمین
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
